case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF CCSF VS. RAY E MORRIS

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF CCSF
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,577.32 FILED BY HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF CCSF AS TO DEFENDANT MORRIS, RAY E ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-01-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE DISMISSED AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF WITH PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE AT THE PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF CCSF'S REPRESENTATIVE JOSEPH QUARTELL. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
